name: Doba
description: Doba Retailer API for dropshipping product discovery and product-update polling. Doba uses signed retailer API headers with appKey/signType/timestamp/sign.

credential_fields.name: private_key
credential_fields.label: RSA Private Key
credential_fields.description: Doba Retailer API RSA private key used to generate RSA2 request signatures. Paste PEM format if available; raw base64 key material is also accepted.

credential_fields.name: public_key
credential_fields.label: Public Key
credential_fields.description: Doba public key, if your account shows one. Stored for reference; signed API calls use app key and private key.

tools.name: categories_list
tools.description: List Doba product categories. Category IDs can be used with spu_list for product discovery.

tools.name: suppliers_list
tools.description: List Doba suppliers and supplier information. Supplier IDs can be used with spu_list.

tools.name: spu_list
tools.description: Search Doba SPUs by supplier, category, keyword, shipping country, price, inventory, listing time, and marketplace restrictions.

freeShipping.description: Return only free-shipping products when true.

pageSize.description: Products per page. Doba docs describe a maximum of 100.

maxEstProcessingTime.description: Maximum estimated processing time in business days.

excludeMarketRestrictions.description: Comma-separated marketplaces to exclude, for example Amazon,eBay,Walmart.

pickupAvailable.description: Whether pickup with a prepaid shipping label is supported.

tools.name: spu_detail_get
tools.description: Get Doba SPU/product detail. Use SPU IDs from spu_list or spu_ids_query_by_tag.

ordBusiId.description: Supplier/business ID when required by Doba.

shipTo.description: Destination country code for availability/market restriction details.

tools.name: updated_products_query
tools.description: Query Doba product update information. Use this for delta polling of product price, inventory, and status changes.

count.description: Items per page. Doba documentation describes 20 default and 100 maximum.

startTime.description: Optional start time for updated products, in the format accepted by Doba.

endTime.description: Optional end time for updated products, in the format accepted by Doba.

changeType.description: Optional Doba update/change type filter when enabled for the account.

tools.name: spu_ids_query_by_tag
tools.description: Query valid Doba SPU IDs by tag. Use this as a product-discovery entry point for a known Doba tag.

tools.name: shipping_rate_estimate
tools.description: Estimate Doba shipping options and fees for products. Pass Doba's Product Shipping Rate Estimate request as body.

body.description: Doba shipping estimate body: shipToCountry, optional shipToProvince/city/zip/platformId/shipId, and goods array with itemNo and quantity.

tools.name: prepay_balance_get
tools.description: Get Doba prepay balance from the payment-management API.
